query:
select title, url as bookmark_url, id as bookmark_id
            from bookmarks
            where bookmarks.search @@ plainto_tsquery($1)
                and bookmarks.ap_user_id = $2
            order by ts_rank('{0.0, 1.0, 0.4, 1.0}'::float4[], bookmarks.search, plainto_tsquery($1)) desc
            limit $3
            offset $4
